mnemonics: Remember SSA: Static Single Assignment for optimization
Think LALR: Look-Ahead LR for efficient parsing
keyPoints: Code optimization techniques improve program efficiency without changing functionality
Syntax-directed translation generates intermediate code using grammar rules
Error handling and recovery mechanisms are crucial for practical compilers
commonMistakes: Confusing semantic analysis with syntax analysis
Assuming optimization always reduces execution time (may increase code size)
Overlooking the importance of symbol table management across phases
